sections.title: Before completion of the Spirits of the Elid

lines.speaker: Ali the Carter
lines.text: Water, water get your fresh water here, 1000 coins a waterskin, a bargain in these difficult times.

lines.speaker: Ali the Carter
lines.text: Well it's the cheapest water you'll find in this town.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll give it a miss.

sections.title: After completion of the Spirits of the Elid

lines.speaker: Ali the Carter
lines.text: Business here really seems to have dried up. I had a good thing going here and you spoiled it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well it serves you right really. Taking advantage of people like that.

lines.speaker: Ali the Carter
lines.text: So want to buy some water?

lines.speaker: Ali the Carter
lines.text: To you 1000 coins for a waterskin!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll give it a miss.

sections.title: When using any item on Ali's Water Cart or Water Barrel

lines.speaker: Ali the Carter
lines.text: If you want water you need to buy it off me.
